assumptions: Root package metadata should be stable for registry/editor integrations.
Existing dependency constraints from main are intentionally preserved during metadata-only changes.
changes: Added root package.json homepage/repository/bugs metadata fields.
Updated the branch onto current main so the PR diff preserves the existing esbuild override without including it as part of this metadata change.

checks.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('package.json')); print(d['repository']); print(d['homepage']); print(d['bugs'])"

notes: No runtime or rendered UI behavior changed; this is package provenance metadata.
